Use for sheet pan layout, mold filling, and macro spoon actions.

references.role: open oven context for tray insert
references.prompt: Oven is already open; tray slides in without door manipulation.
Use for jammy roast bubbles, darkened edges, and steam.

references.role: food processor or blender vessel shape
references.prompt: Processor bowl shape for chunky puree beats only.
Whisk shape for cream ribbon trails.
Spoon for dollops, lifts, and puree ribbons.
Character identity for hands and satisfaction beat only.

references.role: top-down hands for spoon and mold actions
references.prompt: Top-down hand pose for layering and stick insert.
Three-quarter satisfied pose without touching dish.
Canonical outro motion reference for final segment only.

references.role: jammy roasted halved strawberries with pooled ruby syrup on parchment
references.prompt: Jammy roasted halved strawberries collapsed on parchment with thick glossy ruby syrup pool, darkened caramelized edges, about 20-24 halves on a half sheet scale. Generate one vertical 9:16 reference still on the Licorn terrazzo island context, no character, no text. Halves about 2-3 cm wide each, not oversized berries.

references.role: chunky maple-sweetened strawberry puree with visible seeds and fruit bits
references.prompt: Chunky pink strawberry puree with visible seeds and small fruit pieces, glossy but not smooth sorbet, in a clear processor bowl. Generate one vertical 9:16 reference still on terrazzo island, no character, no text. Bowl about 18-22 cm wide relative to counter, not miniature.

references.role: silky maple-vanilla coconut cream in mixing bowl
references.prompt: Thick white coconut cream with silky ribbon trails in a clear mixing bowl, faint maple marbling, no curdle separation. Generate one vertical 9:16 reference still on terrazzo island, no character, no text.

references.role: silicone bar mold with pink and white marbled layers before full freeze
references.prompt: Silicone bar popsicle mold with 8-10 narrow cavities showing alternating chunky pink puree and white cream layers, sticks not yet inserted, fills about two-thirds per cavity. Generate one vertical 9:16 overhead-leaning reference on terrazzo island, no character, no text. Each cavity about 10-12 cm deep and 2.5-3 cm wide, not oversized mold.

references.role: intact frozen streaked pop on stick after release
references.prompt: Single intact frozen popsicle on wooden stick with visible pink and white streak bands, light surface frost, no bite, no melting drip. Generate one vertical 9:16 reference still held above terrazzo island, no character, no text. Pop about 10-12 cm long and 2.5-3 cm wide, not miniature, not oversized.

references.role: finished hero pops for outro dish identity and GPT-Image reference
references.prompt: Three streaked strawberry-cream popsicles stand intact in a simple board holder on the terrazzo island, pink-white bands and light frost visible, motionless on the counter. Generate one vertical 9:16 hero still with soft daylight, no character in frame, no text. Each pop about 10-12 cm long and 2.5-3 cm wide, not oversized, not miniature.
